title: Kanchana Fort
tagline: Kanchana Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Kanchana Fort is a hill fort in the Nashik district of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Kanchana Fort is a hill fort in the Nashik district of Maharashtra. The fort is located in the Ajantha-Saatmal Mountain range. The height of the hill in which the fort is located is 1368m or 4490 ft. Kalwan is the name of the village where the hill is situated.

topPlaces.name: Rajdher fort
topPlaces.description: Rajdeher Fort is a fort located 10 km (6.2 mi) from chandwad, Nashik district, of Maharashtra. This fort is an important fort in Nashik district.

topPlaces.name: Dhodap
topPlaces.description: Dhodap is one of the hill forts in Maharashtra state in India. Situated in Chandwad taluka in the Nashik district.

items.note: Rajdeher Fort is a fort located 10 km (6.2 mi) from chandwad, Nashik district, of Maharashtra. This fort is an important fort in Nashik district.
Dhodap is one of the hill forts in Maharashtra state in India. Situated in Chandwad taluka in the Nashik district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanchana Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanchana Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanchana Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanchana Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanchana Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanchana Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Kanchana Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kanchana Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rajdher fort, Dhodap.
